chain.thought: Explanation: The table lists Year 1 as 2013, 2016, 2019, 2022; Year 2 as 2014, 2017, 2020, 2023; and Year 3 as 2015, 2018, 2021, 2024, showing a three-year cycle. Therefore, the same verses are read again every three years.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table shows a triennial cycle: Year 1 (e.g., 2013, 2016, 2019, 2022) reads 6:2–7:7, Year 2 reads 7:8–8:15, and Year 3 reads 8:16–9:35. These years repeat every three years, and the same verse ranges are read again when the cycle returns to the same year designation. Therefore, it takes 3 years to read the same verses again.
